name: artifact-documents-plugin
description: Document scheme + storages + templates for the cjhowe-us/artifact-plugin ecosystem. Ships a `document` vertex scheme (markdown body + structured content, pydantic-validated), a `document-confluence` storage (Confluence Cloud REST v2), and eight jinja2 markdown templates (design-document, implementation-plan, review-note, release-note, test-plan, requirement, user-story, triage-note).
